items.markdown:
![BENEFECT 1 gal. All-Purpose Botanical Cleaner and ...](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161304-4353-0139-0000-5ca9189ab199:4)
Benefect Botanical Decon 30 is `a ready-to-use, plant-based disinfectant cleaner (light lemon & thyme scent) that kills over 99.99% of bacteria and viruses in just 30 seconds` . It is ideal for mold remediation, water damage restoration, and general disinfecting, featuring thymol as the active ingredient with no synthetic fragrances, dyes, or bleach.[[1]](https://benefect.com/ca/products/decon-30/#:~:text=Decon%2030%20has%20the%20following%20features:%20*,other%20odor-causing%20organisms**%20*%20**No%20synthetic%20chemicals**)[[2]](https://prosolutionsdirect.com/products/benefect-botanical-decon-thirty)[[3]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/benefect-decon-30-disinfectant-cleaner-sanitizer/#:~:text=In%20addition%20to%20being%20bactericidal%20against%20Staphylococcus,H1N1%20on%20hard%2C%20non-porous%2C%20and%20inanimate%20surfaces.)[[4]](https://www.amazon.com/Benefect-Botanical-Disinfectant-Hospital-Food-Contact/dp/B071Y439JC#:~:text=Decon%2030%20effectively%20kills%20over%2099.99%25%20of,mold%20by%20simply%20applying%20and%20air%20drying.)[[5]](https://shopnutech.com/product/benefect-decon-30-disinfectant/)

**Key Features and Usage for Benefect Decon 30:** 

- **Application:** Spray directly onto surfaces. It can be wiped, mopped, or left to air dry. For best results, it can be applied using a foam sprayer to prevent running on vertical surfaces.
- **No Rinsing Needed:** Being a food-surface contact sanitizer, it does not require rinsing, even on kitchen surfaces.
- **Surface Safety:** Safe on various materials including wood framing, concrete, carpets, and hard, non-porous surfaces.
- **Effective Against:** Odor-causing bacteria, fungi, Influenza A, and Rhinovirus (common cold).
- **Safety Profile:** Non-toxic, typically requires no PPE (Personal Protective Equipment), and is safe for use in residential or commercial settings.
- **No Mixing Required:** The formula is ready-to-use, eliminating the need for measuring or dilution.[[1]](https://benefect.com/ca/products/decon-30/#:~:text=Decon%2030%20has%20the%20following%20features:%20*,other%20odor-causing%20organisms**%20*%20**No%20synthetic%20chemicals**)[[2]](https://www.amazon.com/Benefect-Botanical-Disinfectant-Hospital-Food-Contact/dp/B071Y439JC#:~:text=Decon%2030%20effectively%20kills%20over%2099.99%25%20of,mold%20by%20simply%20applying%20and%20air%20drying.)[[3]](https://shopnutech.com/product/benefect-decon-30-disinfectant/)[[4]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=j27jmPAQyvw&t=57)[[5]](https://prosolutionsdirect.com/products/benefect-botanical-decon-thirty)[[6]](https://www.massagewarehouse.com/products/benefect-decon-30-disinfectant-cleaner-sanitizer/#:~:text=In%20addition%20to%20being%20bactericidal%20against%20Staphylococcus,H1N1%20on%20hard%2C%20non-porous%2C%20and%20inanimate%20surfaces.)[[7]](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Vk1MjaqFX-w&t=21)

This cleaner is particularly valued in restoration for being both an effective sanitizer and an environmentally friendly choice.[[1]](https://www.homedepot.com/p/BENEFECT-1-gal-All-Purpose-Botanical-Cleaner-and-Disinfectant-Decon-30-for-Germs-Mold-Remediation-on-Multi-Surface-1-Unit-20476/315325563)
